backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application, with blob storage and access control mixins and full CRUD logic for journeys, locations, ratings, music, and more.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts the old text-keyed Journey map to a new nat-keyed map (journeysV2) with an added id field and optional customTitle, assigning sequential IDs during upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features—customTitle support in mutation hooks, Journey Title UI input, and city-grouped collapsible journey list—to their relevant files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading SunCalc via CDN and mounting the app into a div#root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component for managing journeys with a city-grouped collapsible list, add/edit dialogs featuring an optional Journey Title input and date-range calendar picker, and delete confirmation, forwarding customTitle to backend mutations.
Invisible utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role check, admin promotion) to the browser console on mount.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: A React component for managing city photo/video albums, supporting file uploads, media removal, and social media link management with Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing a geonames city database, supporting CSV file import, paginated browsing, search, and CRUD operations for city records.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A React component that renders a 10-heart rating widget supporting full, partial, and empty heart states with click and hover interactions for selecting decimal ratings up to 10.0.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A large React component rendering an interactive 3D globe using Three.js, with support for city markers, country borders/labels, timezone overlays, solar terminator, and flight animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: React component that renders a scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day in a polaroid-card layout with Comic Sans fonts and amber/orange color scheme.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: React component that renders a vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with retro ribbon headers, postage stamp decorations, and serif fonts.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A React dialog component for viewing, adding, updating, and deleting location info entries with optional photo uploads stored via a blob storage hook.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: A React dialog component that handles Internet Identity authentication, displaying login/logout controls and the user's principal ID with status indicators.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that displays travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as custom markers with popups showing ratings, media galleries, and route overlays. Supports filtering by city/journey, adding bookmarks, and focusing on specific spots or bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) for a travel spot. Supports fullscreen viewing, carousel navigation, and lazy-loaded blob-storage file URLs.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for managing music albums and songs, supporting CRUD operations on albums and file-upload-based song addition with search/filter functionality. Uses React Query mutations and a blob-storage file upload hook.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music browser panel that lists all music albums and their songs, allowing the user to select a song for playback via a callback prop. Shows an empty/unauthenticated state when no albums exist or the user is not logged in.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls that manages an HTML Audio element for the currently selected song. Supports both externally controlled song selection and internal playlist navigation across all albums.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: A React component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to a backend canister and IndexedDB caching, with a manual multi-step execution flow for persisting and verifying the data.
A panel component for managing travel journeys (CRUD), grouping them by city with status indicators (live/upcoming/past), and supporting itinerary display in doodle or retro styles with flight animation and 2D map callbacks.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A CRUD management component for travel spots that supports adding, editing, and deleting spots with media file uploads and social media link validation, organized by city.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel that aggregates and displays bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type, with icons and colors per category, supporting focus callbacks for individual spots or bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings dialog component for managing website layout preferences such as toggling the music player and setting a default search place, with a live local time and UTC offset display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous actors, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and exposing login status states to child components via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central hooks file exporting React Query-based data fetching and mutation hooks for the backend, plus utility functions for social media URL validation, country name normalization, and OpenStreetMap geocoding.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (including sidebar and music player variants), and includes utility rules for heading colors on dark vs. bright backgrounds.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) by querying the Intl API against GeoJSON timezone data.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data, using IndexedDB as a local cache and falling back to a backend fetch, with validation and window-level caching.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D globe using Three.js, with quarter-hour UTC offset precision, antimeridian unwrapping, and optional translucent fill meshes for hovered regions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page supporting 2D/3D globe views, location search, timezone overlays, travel spots, flight animations, and multiple side panels (music, travelogue, admin, etc.).
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color and label utilities for schedule day grouping, including a color palette cycler, day label generator, and day-index computation from nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time, then builds per-day ordered coordinate routes for rendering travel paths on a map.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a travel/journey planning app, tracking existing implemented features and pending feature requests related to multi-journey-per-city support with custom titles and grouped UI.
